studio.title: A personal studio brand built by John Jacob Tamon.
studio.description1: The Studio Cove is my creative workspace for multimedia production. A cove is a sheltered place where rough waters calm down, so the name represents how I bring raw ideas into a focused space and shape them into clean, polished digital work.
studio.description2: It also reflects my personal identity. The word "Cove" is inspired by the inner sound of Jacob, making the brand feel professional while still staying connected to me.
hero.name: John Jacob Tamon
hero.role: Graphics Designer | Video Editor | Social Media Manager | IT Student
hero.description: I create multimedia assets, manage social content, edit videos, and support digital production workflows through The Studio Cove.
skills.title: My Skills and Experience
skills.description: Detail-oriented IT student with over 3 years of experience handling digital media, social accounts, technical workflows, and multimedia editing for campus, church, and client-facing projects.
samples.title: Sample Works
samples.description: A cleaner look at selected video edits, graphics work, and production support samples from The Studio Cove.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: For multimedia production, graphics, video editing, social media support, or technical digital assistance, reach me through the details below.
